data.title: WiMi Hologram Cloud Secures $10 Million in Initial Convertible Note Issuance
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

WiMi Hologram Cloud ( (WIMI) ) just unveiled an update.

On May 20, 2025, WiMi Hologram Cloud Inc. entered into Convertible Note Purchase Agreements with certain investors, planning to issue convertible notes worth up to $40 million. On May 23, 2025, the company completed an initial closing by issuing $10 million in notes. These notes, sold at a discount, are convertible into Class B ordinary shares and have a term of 360 days. The proceeds from this transaction will be used for working capital and general corporate purposes, potentially strengthening the company’s financial position and operational capabilities.

Spark’s Take on WIMI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WIMI is a Neutral.

WiMi Hologram Cloud’s stock score is primarily influenced by its mixed financial performance. The company’s strong cash position and recent improvements in net income are countered by declining revenue and operational margins. The technical analysis further contributes to a cautious outlook, with bearish indicators signaling potential risks. The stock is fairly valued, but the absence of a dividend yield and lack of positive technical momentum hold back the overall score.

To see Spark’s full report on WIMI stock, click here.

More about WiMi Hologram Cloud

WiMi Hologram Cloud Inc. operates in the technology industry, focusing on providing augmented reality (AR) and holographic solutions. The company is known for its innovative products and services that cater to various market segments, including entertainment, advertising, and education.

Average Trading Volume: 764,709

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $34.67M

data.title: Marin Software Faces Nasdaq Non-Compliance Notice
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Marin Software ( (MRIN) ) has issued an update.

On May 21, 2025, Marin Software received a notification from Nasdaq indicating non-compliance with listing requirements due to delayed filings of its quarterly and annual reports. The company has until June 16, 2025, to submit a compliance plan. Concurrently, Marin’s board has approved a plan for voluntary liquidation and dissolution, pending stockholder approval on June 11, 2025. If the dissolution proceeds, Marin’s stock will be delisted from Nasdaq, impacting its market presence and stakeholders.

Spark’s Take on MRIN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MRIN is a Neutral.

Marin Software’s overall score reflects its significant financial challenges, underscored by declining revenues and persistent losses. Technical analysis suggests mixed signals, with potential for oversold conditions. Valuation concerns arise from a negative P/E ratio and lack of dividend yield. The earnings call provided some positive developments in operational efficiency, but financial constraints remain a key concern.

To see Spark’s full report on MRIN stock, click here.

More about Marin Software

Marin Software Incorporated, headquartered in San Francisco, California, provides a cross-channel advertising management platform designed to help digital marketers measure, manage, and optimize their online advertising campaigns. The company was founded in 2006 and is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker MRIN.

Average Trading Volume: 1,631,328

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $3.19M

Brand Engagement Network ( (BNAI) ) has issued an announcement.

On May 21, 2025, Brand Engagement Network Inc. (BEN) received a notification from Nasdaq regarding non-compliance with Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) due to the late filing of its Quarterly Report for the quarter ended March 31, 2025. BEN has until July 20, 2025, to regain compliance by filing the report or submitting a compliance plan. The company is working to file the report promptly but may submit a plan if unable to meet the deadline, with potential extensions granted by Nasdaq if accepted.

To see Spark’s full report on BNAI stock, click here.

More about Brand Engagement Network

Brand Engagement Network Inc. (BEN) is a company that innovates in AI-powered customer engagement solutions, providing intelligent and scalable services. It focuses on the life sciences, automotive, and retail industries, offering AI-driven engagement solutions such as AI-powered avatars for campaigns and customer service. BEN ensures compliance with standards like GDPR and HIPAA, and holds numerous patents in AI-driven consumer engagement.

data.title: Onco-Innovations Strengthens AI-Powered Precision Oncology with New Senior Scientific Advisor
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Onco-Innovations Ltd. ( (TSE:ONCO) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Onco-Innovations Limited has appointed Professor Steven Jones as Senior Scientific Advisor to enhance its AI-powered precision oncology efforts. Professor Jones, a renowned expert in genomics and cancer research, will provide scientific leadership and help guide the company’s flagship AI platform, SynoGraph, developed by its subsidiary Inka Health. His role will involve shaping research strategies, fostering collaborations, and engaging with stakeholders to advance Onco-Innovations’ mission in transforming cancer care.

More about Onco-Innovations Ltd.

Onco-Innovations Limited is a Canadian-based company specializing in cancer research and treatment, with a focus on oncology. The company is dedicated to pioneering research and innovative solutions for the prevention and treatment of cancer, and it holds an exclusive worldwide license for patented technology targeting solid tumors.

His departure is acknowledged with gratitude by Lyft’s CEO, who praised Cohen’s contributions and expertise in the travel sector. The board plans to reduce its size from ten to nine members.

data.title: Lake Shore Bancorp Announces Stock Offering Conversion
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Lake Shore Bancorp ( (LSBK) ) has shared an update.

On May 23, 2025, Lake Shore Bancorp, Inc. announced the commencement of a stock offering as part of its conversion from a mutual holding company to a stock holding company. The new Maryland corporation aims to sell up to 5,750,000 shares, with a potential increase to 6,612,500 shares, at $10.00 per share. This move involves converting the bank’s charter to a New York commercial bank and renaming it Lake Shore Bank. The stock offering is primarily available to eligible depositors and the employee stock ownership plan, with any remaining shares offered to the community and public stockholders. The completion of this conversion and offering is contingent upon selling at least 4,250,000 shares and receiving necessary regulatory and stockholder approvals.

Spark’s Take on LSBK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LSBK is a Neutral.

Lake Shore Bancorp’s strong financial performance is overshadowed by declining operating cash flow and a recent dividend suspension, which could impact investor sentiment. Technical indicators suggest moderate upside potential, while valuation appears fair. The dividend suspension due to corporate restructuring adds uncertainty, slightly lowering the overall score.

To see Spark’s full report on LSBK stock, click here.

More about Lake Shore Bancorp

Lake Shore Federal Bancorp is the mid-tier holding company for Lake Shore Savings Bank, a community-oriented financial institution based in Dunkirk, New York. The bank operates ten full-service branches in Western New York and provides a wide range of retail and commercial lending and deposit services. Its common stock is traded on the NASDAQ Global Market under the symbol ‘LSBK’.

Average Trading Volume: 5,602

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $86.2M
